messages.text: Northstar wants a clean recovery plan before they sign the renewal.
Support still sees onboarding jobs stalling on the last export step.
Do not send the release note until Jira and CRM are aligned.
I need one owner, one timeline, and a customer-safe next step.

issues.title: Renewal blocker: onboarding export stalls at account sync
issues.description: The Northstar renewal is at risk because the last onboarding export still times out.

issues.title: Launch checklist still waiting on customer-safe messaging
issues.description: Release comms need updated customer language before they can go out.

issues.title: Support queue compression for enterprise onboarding
issues.description: Support handoff is backing up while the export issue remains unresolved.

threads.subject: Need a clean renewal plan by today

messages.subject: Need a clean renewal plan by today
messages.snippet: We are still waiting for a concrete recovery plan and an owner we can trust.

threads.subject: Hold the release note until onboarding is green

messages.subject: Hold the release note until onboarding is green
messages.snippet: Customer-facing messaging must match the actual recovery state.

documents.title: Northstar recovery plan
documents.body: Owner, customer timeline, rollback path, and customer-safe communication plan.

documents.title: Launch readiness checklist
documents.body: Release note hold, support staffing, CRM updates, onboarding export validation.
